name: Dragon Hunter RPG
description:
You're a dragon hunter who must slay or tame them. Try or fail and be the best amongst others.

Artist: yamaraim

Location/Dragons:

The Obsidian Wastes (Volcanic Region)

Pyrratha, the Molten Tyrant – Fire dragon ruling over the lava flows.

Garnessa, the Ashfang Drake – A powerful fire drake thriving in the molten terrain.

Lady Velthara, the Crimson Warbringer – Warlord of a fierce Dragonkin army.

Frostveil Tundra (Frozen Expanse)

Hrimvelda, the Winter’s Wrath – Ice dragon who rules the frozen domain.

Syvra, the Icefang Guardian – A stoic drake protecting sacred frost caverns.

Frostkin Clans – Isolated Dragonkin tribes surviving in the icy wilds.

The Skybound Isles (Floating Archipelago)

Veythara, the Storm Huntress – A wyvern ruling the stormy skies.

Bellora, the Thunder Drake – A high-speed drake leaping between islands.

Zephyrian Dragonkin – Aerial Dragonkin warriors defending the floating sanctuaries.

The Shrouded Hollow (Dark Forest)

Nyriss, the Shadowfang – A Dragonkin assassin controlling the night.

Zyllis, the Venomfang Matriarch – A deadly wyvern whose venom corrupts the land.

Sylvian Dragonkin Tribes – Jungle-dwelling Dragonkin practicing ancient rituals.

The Bone Dunes (Desert Wasteland)

Tysha, the Bone Harbinger – A skeletal wyvern bound by necromantic magic.

Nomadic Drake Tribes – Surviving on the fringes of the desert, scavenging dragon remains.

The Ember Bastion (Dragon Fortress)

Lady Velthara, the Crimson Warbringer – Supreme leader of the Dragonkin legions.

Elite Dragonkin Warriors – Training for battle using dragonforged weapons.

The Arcane Spire (Magical Nexus)

Eldora, the Arcane Shaper – A master of draconic magic.

Mystic Dragonkin Scholars – Guardians of forgotten spells and relics.

The Abyssal Chasm (Underground Cavern)

Earthbound Dragonkin Clans – Living in hidden underground settlements.

Deep Drake Beasts – Territorial creatures lurking in the darkness.
creator: TheTinyAdventuner
